Provide proofs to establish the validity of the following arguments:

a. $\ph\conj\psi\proves\psi\conj\ph$

b. $\proves \neg(\ph\conj\neg\ph)$

c. $\ph\imp(\psi\imp\chi), \ph\imp\psi\proves\ph\imp\chi$

d. $\neg\ph\imp\neg\psi\proves\psi\imp\ph$

e. $\ph\proves\neg\neg\ph$

f. $\neg\ph\proves\ph\imp\psi$

g. $\ph\proves\ph\imp\psi$

h. $\ph\conj\neg\psi\proves\neg(\ph\imp\psi)$
